title: “They’re surrounding São Paulo” – air traffic controllers detected UFOs flying around the state. [1984]
excerpt: On November 11, 1984, from 00:30 to 01:36, 1 aircraft and 4 air traffic control centers in a region close to the city of São Paulo-SP communicated with each other to deal with sightings and detections of several unidentified flying objects over the State of São Paulo. text_preview:
On November 11, 1984, from 00:30 to 01:36, 1 aircraft and 4 air traffic control centers in a region close to the city of São Paulo-SP communicated with each other to deal with sightings and detections of several unidentified flying objects over the State of São Paulo.

First, the APP-SP [São Paulo-SP Approach Control] called the ACC-BS [Brasília Area Control Center] reporting that it was detecting an object on the radar at 5NM São Paulo-SP, in the position Southeast. The ACC-BS replied that it had no aircraft flying, but that they also had detected an object flying very slowly, around “13 knot
summary: On Nov 11, 1984, multiple ATC centers coordinated over 66 minutes tracking several UFOs surrounding São Paulo; one object accelerated from 15 to 500 knots and up to 8 primary radar contacts were recorded.
